rza.title: Relay Protection & Automation Analysis — JSC ROSATOM ENERGOKHIMTEKHNOLOGII
rza.h1: Analysis of Correct RPA Device Operation
rza.label: RPA Analysis
rza.sub: Calculations and setpoint selection, including support for Siemens MP devices (Siprotec 4, Siprotec 5, IEC 61850, DIGSI).
rza.works.title: Scope of Works
rza.li2: Assessment of CT saturation time and circuit breaker interrupting capacity
rza.li3: Analysis of existing and selection of new RPA settings
rza.li4: Analysis of correct RPA device operation considering the aperiodic component of short-circuit current
rza.li5: Analysis of relative selectivity protection behavior
rza.li6: Receiving and resolving operational service queries regarding MP RPA devices
rza.li7: Collecting statistics on incorrect operation cases of installed RPA
rza.li8: Support of installed Siemens MP RPA devices (Siprotec 4, Siprotec 5, IEC 61850, DIGSI)
rza.results.title: Results & Key Effects
rza.res1.title: Up-to-Date Setting Sheets
rza.res1.desc: Verified and current device settings for operational services
rza.res2.title: Electrical Equipment Selection
rza.res2.desc: Justified equipment selection based on short-circuit current calculations and settings
rza.res3.title: Operational Service Support
rza.res3.desc: Regular technical support for relay protection and dispatch services
rza.bullet1: Improved reliability and safety of power facility operation
rza.bullet3: Reduced work completion time through competency concentration in a single corporate center
rza.cta.title: Need RPA Support?
rza.cta.desc: Contact the area supervisor — Vitaliy Chumachenko, Deputy General Director for Power System Modeling.
